summary: NLYT Navigation Refactor Testing - AppNavbar and AppBreadcrumb. Fixed critical bug in Profile.js (missing Settings icon import). All navigation features working correctly after fix.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED - Missing 'Settings' icon import from lucide-react causing 'Settings is not defined' error

active_state: ✅ 'Tableau de bord' link is dark/active (text-slate-900) on /dashboard
breadcrumb: ✅ Breadcrumb shows 'Tableau de bord > Paramètres' on /settings
✅ Breadcrumb shows 'Tableau de bord > Paramètres > Profil' on /settings/profile
✅ Breadcrumb shows 'Tableau de bord > Paramètres > Wallet' on /settings/wallet
✅ Breadcrumb shows 'Tableau de bord > Paramètres > Intégrations' on /settings/integrations
✅ Breadcrumb shows 'Tableau de bord > Paramètres > Workspace' on /settings/workspace
✅ Breadcrumb shows 'Tableau de bord > Paramètres > Paiement' on /settings/payment
✅ Breadcrumb shows 'Tableau de bord > Nouvel engagement' on wizard
✅ Breadcrumb shows appointment title on detail page
✅ Breadcrumb links are clickable and navigate correctly
settings_navigation: ✅ No dead-end on /settings page - user can navigate back to dashboard via navbar or breadcrumb
retour_buttons: ✅ 'Retour à l'engagement' button present on ParticipantManagement page
duplicate_logos: ✅ No duplicate inline NLYT logos detected

critical_code_review_comments: Profile.js was missing 'Settings' import from lucide-react - FIXED by adding Settings to import statement
context_for_next_testing_agent: Navigation refactor complete. AppNavbar and AppBreadcrumb components are working correctly on all authenticated pages. Profile.js had a missing import that was fixed. All breadcrumb paths are correct and clickable. Active state styling works correctly for nav links.
screenshots: .screenshots/nav_test_settings.png - Settings hub with navbar and breadcrumb
.screenshots/nav_test_profile.png - Profile page with navbar and breadcrumb (after fix)
.screenshots/nav_test_wallet.png - Wallet page with navbar and breadcrumb

.screenshots/nav_test_detail.png - Appointment detail with navbar and breadcrumb
.screenshots/nav_test_participants.png - Participant management with navbar, breadcrumb and Retour button
.screenshots/nav_integrations.png - Integrations page with navbar and breadcrumb
.screenshots/nav_workspace.png - Workspace settings with navbar and breadcrumb
.screenshots/nav_payment.png - Payment settings with navbar and breadcrumb
.screenshots/nav_disputes.png - Dispute center with navbar and breadcrumb

fix_applied.before: import { User, Clock, Euro, Heart, Save, Loader2, Check } from 'lucide-react';
fix_applied.after: import { User, Clock, Euro, Heart, Save, Loader2, Check, Settings } from 'lucide-react';
fix_applied.reason: Settings icon was used on line 269 but not imported, causing 'Settings is not defined' ReferenceError
